message:
fix(search): correct boolean query parsing for NOT + OR combinations

Fix critical bug where "NOT apple OR orange" was incorrectly parsed as
"apple OR orange", dropping the negation entirely. The issue occurred
when pulling the last clause into an OR group without checking if it
was a Must (AND) vs MustNot (NOT) clause.

Query parsing changes:
- Check clause type BEFORE popping to avoid dropping MustNot clauses
- Add transpile_to_fts5() for SQLite FTS5 query generation with proper
  operator precedence (OR binds tighter than AND in our grammar)
- Fix suffix wildcard regex to anchor at end (*foo -> .*foo$)

HTML export overhaul:
- Replace 3500+ lines of hand-rolled CSS with Tailwind v4 @theme system
- Tokyo Night color palette via CSS custom properties
- Light theme support via [data-theme="light"] overrides
- CDN mode uses browser compilation; offline mode uses utility classes

Remote host probe improvements:
- Add machine_id detection (Linux /etc/machine-id, macOS IOPlatformUUID)
- New deduplicate_probe_results() merges SSH aliases pointing to same host
- Check ~/.cargo/bin for cass/cargo in non-interactive SSH sessions
- Better error handling for cass health/stats commands

Also includes:
- Test case tests/reproduce_query_bug.rs demonstrating the NOT+OR fix
- Connector improvements for better message parsing
- UI component refinements for export modal and toast displays

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

+/// Calculate a centered rectangle with percentage dimensions.
+pub fn centered_rect(percent_x: u16, percent_y: u16, r: Rect) -> Rect {
+    let popup_layout = Layout::default()
+        .direction(Direction::Vertical)
+        .constraints(
+            [
+                Constraint::Percentage((100 - percent_y) / 2),
+                Constraint::Percentage(percent_y),
+                Constraint::Percentage((100 - percent_y) / 2),
+            ]
+            .as_ref(),
+        )
+        .split(r);
+
+    let horizontal = Layout::default()
+        .direction(Direction::Horizontal)
+        .constraints(
+            [
+                Constraint::Percentage((100 - percent_x) / 2),
+                Constraint::Percentage(percent_x),
+                Constraint::Percentage((100 - percent_x) / 2),
+            ]
+            .as_ref(),
+        )
+        .split(popup_layout[1]);
+
+    horizontal[1]
+}
+
+/// Create a centered popup with fixed dimensions.
+/// The popup is clamped to available terminal space and centered.
+pub fn centered_rect_fixed(width: u16, height: u16, r: Rect) -> Rect {
+    // Clamp dimensions to available space (leave margin for visual separation)
+    let actual_width = width.min(r.width.saturating_sub(4));
+    let actual_height = height.min(r.height.saturating_sub(2));
+
+    let popup_layout = Layout::default()
+        .direction(Direction::Vertical)
+        .constraints([
+            Constraint::Length(r.height.saturating_sub(actual_height) / 2),
+            Constraint::Length(actual_height),
+            Constraint::Length(r.height.saturating_sub(actual_height) / 2),
+        ])
+        .split(r);
+
+    let horizontal = Layout::default()
+        .direction(Direction::Horizontal)
+        .constraints([
+            Constraint::Length(r.width.saturating_sub(actual_width) / 2),
+            Constraint::Length(actual_width),
+            Constraint::Length(r.width.saturating_sub(actual_width) / 2),
+        ])
+        .split(popup_layout[1]);
+
+    horizontal[1]
+}
+
+
